dashboard.label: AI Investigation
dashboard.description: AI-assisted forensic investigation of the compromised domain controller (SRL-2018) — verdict, MITRE kill-chain and remediation rendered as native @splunk/react-ui controls via A2UI.

html.div: ✦ AI triage → React controls — the splunklib.ai agent queries the forensics index through the Splunk MCP Server, structures its verdict, and exposes it as A2UI. Information-dense rendering below.
